zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebenezer Morris於1664年4月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利時，他的父親Edward Morris33歲，母親Grace Bett30歲。他於1692年9月1日與Sarah Davis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓姆迪 利維結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1718年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年53歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebenezer Morris于1664年4月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利时，他的父亲Edward Morris33岁，母亲Grace Bett30岁。他于1692年9月1日与Sarah Davis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓姆迪 利維结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1718年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年53岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可武德斯托可 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Mauritz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Armin, Frieda, Helmut, Kurt, Reinhold, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from the personal name Mauritz, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Mauricio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Mario, Roberto, Lilia, Luis, Adela, Andres, Antero, Cipriano.  Portuguese Manoel.
Portuguese (Maurício) and Spanish: from the personal name Maurício (Portuguese), Mauricio (Spanish), derived from the Latin name Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Maurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Armand, Denys, Gabrielle, Antoine, Benoit, Camille, Cecile, Francois, Gaston, Germain.
French, English, Welsh, Scottish, and Irish: from the Old French personal name Maurice, Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: McMorris
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muiris, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of Morris . In some cases this is a Gaelicized form of Fitzmaurice .
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muirgheasa ‘son of Muirgheas’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘sea valor’ or ‘sea choice’. Compare Morrissey .

variants.name: Morici
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Gasper, Aldo, Angelo, Annamarie, Elvio, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo, Vito.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a variant of the personal name Maurice (see Morris ).
Hungarian: patronymic from the personal name Móric, Hungarian form of Morris .

variants.name: Moris
meanings: English: variant of   Morris  .

French, Luxembourgish, Flemish, Walloon, North German, and Dutch: from a vernacular form of the French personal name Maurice (see Morris ). In North America, the surname Moris may also be an altered form of French Maurice .
Americanized form of German   Moritz  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Maurizio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Marcello, Marco, Mario, Fernando, Matteo, Natale, Sal, Valentino, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Maurizio, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris 1).

variants.name: Morehouse
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the many places called Moorhouse in Yorkshire or Durham (from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūs ‘house’). In some cases the surname may have become Morris . This name is also established in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Ebenezer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a biblical place name (meaning ‘stone of help’ in Hebrew). This was the site of the battle where the Israelites were defeated by the Philistines (1 Samuel 4:1). After they took their revenge, Samuel set up a memorial stone bearing this name (1 Samuel 7:12). It was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 17th century, possibly after being misread in the Bible as a personal name, or else because of its favourable etymological connotations. It now has unfavourable connotations because of the miserly character of  Ebenezer Scrooge  in  Charles Dickens's  A Christmas Carol (  1843 ), but nevertheless is still occasionally used.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the Memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebenezer Morris was born on 14 April 1664, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Edward Morris, was 33 and his mother, Grace Bett, was 30. He married Sarah Davis on 1 September 1692, in Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 26 February 1718, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebenezer Morris est né le 14 avril 1664, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Morris, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Grace Bett, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Davis le 1 septembre 1692, à Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 26 février 1718, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebenezer Morris è nato il il 14 aprile 1664 nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Edward Morris, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Grace Bett, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Davis il 1 settembre 1692, nel Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Ebenezer Morrisが1664年4月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward Morrisは33歳，母Grace Bettは30歳であった。1692年9月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンムッドイ リバーでSarah Davisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1718年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックウッドストック ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebenezer Morris(이)가 1664년 4월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Morris(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Bett(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1692년 9월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 무디 라이버에서 Sarah Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1718년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡 우드스톡 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuse: мудди ривир, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebenezer Morris родился 14 апреля 1664 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Edward Morris было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Bett, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Davis 1 сентября 1692 г. в местности мудди ривир, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 26 февраля 1718 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности вудстокк хилл кеметири, вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebenezer Morris nació el 14 de abril de 1664, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edward Morris, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Grace Bett, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Davis el 1 de septiembre de 1692, en Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1718, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Woodstock Hill Cemetery, Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
